name: Japanese Manga
description: 週刊少年ジャンプ風モノクロマンガ。スクリーントーン、集中線、効果線、墨ベタ。Dragon Ball・Naruto・One Pieceの白黒原稿から抽出した純粋なモノクロームデザイン。
source: Shonen Jump manga pages — screentone patterns, speed lines, concentration lines, ink brush strokes, dramatic panel layouts

depth.shadowStyle: none — manga uses linework, not shadows

suggestions.icons: None or minimal — manga relies on linework and screentone, not icons
suggestions.components: screentone pattern fills (dots/diagonal lines), speed lines, concentration lines, speech bubbles with pointed tails, manga panel grids with variable border thickness, onomatopoeia SFX text, ink brush stroke accents
suggestions.avoid: color, gradients, rounded corners, drop shadows, thin hairline borders, soft/pastel anything
suggestions.texture: screentone dots (radial-gradient), diagonal line hatching (repeating-linear-gradient), speed lines (repeating-conic-gradient)
